verdict: Victor Wembanyama is an elite, franchise-altering talent with a profound impact on team success.
strengths: His exceptional impact score, adding 15.7 wins and nearly guaranteeing playoff contention, highlights his immense two-way value and consistent performance.
concern: The primary long-term risk revolves around managing his physical demands and ensuring sustained durability given his unique frame.
recommendation: Immediately sign Wembanyama to the requested $20M contract, which represents a massive underpay compared to his nearly $60M fair market value.
audio_summary: Wembanyama is a generational talent, driving nearly 16 wins and boosting playoff probability to 99.9%. His requested salary is an incredible bargain at over 66% below his true market value.
